sections.paragraph:
Original: ארנן ארנון

Transliteration: 'arnôn 'arnôn

Phonetic: ar-nohn'

BDB Definition:

Arnon = "rushing stream"
  1. a river and surrounding valley in south Palestine, forms the border between Moab and the Amorites

Origin: from H7442

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
